home.hero_subtitle: BRCcheck documents, verifies, and resolves corporate commercial disputes with structured evidence and guaranteed due process.
home.section_recent_sub: The most recently added cases on the platform
home.cta_box_desc: Submit your complaint with verifiable evidence. Our team reviews it before publishing.
home.step1_desc: Every document is validated with date, signature, and source. No evidence, no publication.
home.step2_desc: The company is notified, given a reply period, and reviewed by a panel before any publication.
home.step3_desc: If the conflict is resolved, the company receives a verifiable compliance credential.
home.donation_title: Support BRCcheck with an Ethical Contribution
home.donation_desc: Your contribution keeps BRCcheck transparent, independent, and community-focused.

cases.title: Browse Cases
cases.subtitle: Search the reputational risk case database
cases.search_placeholder: Search by company, city, or description...
cases.no_results: No results found with those criteria.

case_detail.disclaimer_text: The information presented is documentary in nature and has undergone a verification process. BRCcheck does not replace professional legal advice. Companies have the right of reply at all times.
case_detail.reply_subtitle: If you represent a mentioned company, you can submit your official position.
case_detail.reply_success: Your reply has been received and will be reviewed by our team.
case_detail.report_desc: Download the PDF report with all data, sources, and risk assessment.

company.search_placeholder: Search by name, city or sector...

ai.classify_desc: Claude will analyze your file and classify it automatically

submit.title: Submit a Case
submit.subtitle: Complete the 3-step form to register a new case
submit.descripcion_ph: Describe the conflict, people involved, and context...
submit.files_desc: Attach photos, videos or documents that support the case (PDF, DOC, JPG, PNG, MP4...).
submit.confirm_text: By submitting you confirm the information is true to the best of your knowledge and that you have supporting evidence.
submit.success_text: Your case has been received. Our team will verify the sources before publishing.

footer.brand_desc: Evidence, due process, and economic compliance infrastructure.
footer.operated_by: Operated by MC&D LLC · Texas, USA
footer.disclaimer: BRCcheck is not a court and does not replace legal advice.

como_funciona.hero_subtitle: Institutional infrastructure for evidence, due process, and compliance.
not_items: Does not replace the judicial system
Is not an anonymous complaints platform
yes_items: Guarantees notification and right of reply
Turns reputation into a verifiable asset
como_funciona.cta_desc: Register your case with structured evidence and guaranteed due process.

modules.title: Evidence Vault
modules.subtitle: Evidentiary Repository
modules.desc: Structured document storage with date, signature, and source validation. Each file receives a cryptographic hash to guarantee its integrity.

modules.title: Proof-of-Integrity Layer
modules.subtitle: Verification Layer
modules.desc: AI-powered classification system (Claude) that evaluates evidentiary quality and assigns a sufficiency level: Insufficient, Basic, Solid, or Robust.

modules.title: Due Process Engine
modules.subtitle: Due Process Engine
modules.desc: Ensures every company is formally notified before any publication. 15-day period to exercise the right of reply.

modules.title: Resolution Pipeline
modules.subtitle: PACTUM (L1 → L4)
modules.desc: Structured invitation to resolve: L1 Negotiation → L2 Mediation → L3 Arbitration → L4 Litigation. Reduces costs and time vs. the court system.

modules.title: Credential & Trust Layer
modules.subtitle: Verifiable Credentials
modules.desc: If the company resolves the conflict, it receives a verifiable digital credential that converts compliance into a public reputational asset.

steps.title: Case Registration
steps.desc: Complainant uploads facts and evidence with verifiable documents.

steps.title: AI Classification
steps.desc: Claude analyzes and rates the evidence automatically.

steps.title: Notification
steps.desc: Company receives formal notice with a 15-day window to respond.

steps.title: Right of Reply
steps.desc: Company can respond and submit its own evidence.

steps.title: Panel Review
steps.desc: BRCcheck team evaluates both sides objectively.

steps.title: Publication
steps.desc: Case published with full documentary traceability.

steps.title: PACTUM
steps.desc: Structured invitation to resolve the conflict before litigation.

steps.title: Credential
steps.desc: If resolved, a verifiable compliance credential is issued.

membresia.hero_subtitle: Choose the level that best fits your role.
membresia.donation_title: Support BRCcheck with an Ethical Contribution
membresia.donation_desc: Your contribution keeps BRCcheck transparent, independent, and community-focused. Every contribution helps cover operational costs and platform development.

tiers.name: Verified Citizen
tiers.desc: Basic platform access. Browse public cases and register your own.

tiers.name: Founding Collaborator
tiers.desc: Support BRCcheck's operations and access advanced features.

tiers.name: Legal Ally
tiers.desc: For lawyers, firms, and consultants who use BRCcheck as a compliance tool.

tiers.name: Institution / Company
tiers.desc: For institutions, media, organizations, and companies that want to integrate BRCcheck into their due diligence processes.

chatbot.title: BRCcheck Orientation
chatbot.placeholder: Does my case qualify? What evidence do I need?
chatbot.disclaimer: General guidance only. Not a substitute for legal advice.
chatbot.greeting: Hi! I'm the BRCcheck assistant. How can I help? I can tell you if your case qualifies or what evidence you need.
